message:
test(workflows): add 28 property tests for workflow submodule serde types

Covers serde roundtrip for 15 types across 6 workflow submodules:
engine (ExecutionStatus, WorkflowExecution, WorkflowStepPolicyDecision),
step_results (TextMatch, WaitCondition, StepResult),
traits (WorkflowStep, WorkflowInfo),
runner (WorkflowStartResult, WorkflowExecutionResult),
lock (PaneLockInfo), context (WorkflowConfig),
plus policy::ActionKind. Behavioral tests cover StepResult predicates
(is_continue/is_done/is_terminal/is_send_text), WorkflowStartResult
state queries, and constructor-predicate consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
